content:
10k Ghosted illustrates the ephemeral nature of community in NFTs.

While 10k Project celebrated the rise of the MintFace community, 10k Ghosted commiserates those NFT frens who faded away in the crypto winter of 2022.

Each black pixel represents a person who stopped tweeting in May 2022, and likely stopped creating or collecting art altogether.

🥃 Pour one out for frens no longer here.

If you are still part of the 10K Project, congratulations 🎉

Artist Collab: MintFace x Matthew Hirschey

10K Ghosted Snapshot

10k Ghosted has been airdropped to all frens who purchased a 10K Project (color or blueprint) during the crypto winter of 2022.

🎉Thank you for showing up, sharing your art or just for the general sh&tposting and good times.

10K Ghosted Availability

25x 10K Ghosted artworks are available on OpenSea for 0.0457 eth each.

10K Ghosted Airdrops

1x 10K Ghosted artworks have been airdropped to MintFace active community members who purchased a 10K Project blueprint or 10K Project color during the crypto winter 2022.
